<!-- What this task must accomplish. -->

## Evidence / inputs
<!-- Files, datasets, tables, or figures this task depends on. -->

<!-- Concrete, checkable outcome (artifact produced, check passed). -->

## Verification
<!-- How the result will be checked before it is trusted. -->

## Risks
<!-- Leakage, validity, or reproducibility risks to watch. -->
